zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert De Gaunt於大約1048年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln54歲，母親Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg41歲。他和Alice De Montfort至少有2個兒子。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1095年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾包恩享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert De Gaunt于大约1048年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln54岁，母亲Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg41岁。他和Alice De Montfort至少有2个儿子。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1095年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾包恩享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gauntt
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Gaunt  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert De Gaunt was born about 1048, in Ghent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, was 54 and his mother, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, was 41. He had at least 2 sons with Alice De Montfort. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in 1095, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert De Gaunt est né environ 1048, à Gand, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Alice De Montfort. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé en 1095, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert De Gaunt um 1048 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln 54 und seine Mutter Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg 41. Er hatte mit Alice De Montfort mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1095 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert De Gaunt è nato il circa 1048 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Alice De Montfort. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì nel 1095, nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert De Gauntが約1048年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincolnは54歳，母Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourgは41歳であった。彼はAlice De Montfortとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1095年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert De Gaunt(이)가 대략 1048년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Alice De Montfort(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 본에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert De Gaunt nasceu aproximadamente 1048, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Alice De Montfort. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 1095, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert De Gaunt родился около 1048 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, 41. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Alice De Montfort. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1095 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert De Gaunt nació aproximadamente 1048, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Alice De Montfort. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió en 1095, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
